arts.ttl: Report: Daniel Levy's stance on selling Destiny Udogie emerges with Man City and Juventus both very keen
Wolves vs Tottenham predicted as four-goal Premier League thriller unfolds
arts.sum: With Spurs in the bottom half of the Premier League table, winning the Europa League seems the biggest priority, but a 1-1 draw at home to Eintracht Frankfurt in the quarter-final first leg on Thursday night has left the tie in the balance ahead of the return fixture in Germany next week. So, can Spurs pick up a win in the Premier League ahead of next week's big Europa League game?

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Live text coverage of Wolves vs Tottenham is also being provided on Sunday afternoon as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off. Audio coverage of the pre-match build-up, full 90 minutes and post-match reaction of Wolves vs Tottenham is available via Wolves TV and the Wolves App.
